files.why: Duration reads saved param only (no clip-length fallback); _opAcceptsImageInput also checks generationSettings.operation for extend.
extendBody sends generationSettings; extendedItem carries generationSettings + previewAssets; extend concat uses silentComplete.
/extend-video accepts generationSettings, materializes start-frame snapshot under extended item id, persists into sidecar.
export materializeGenerationFrameSnapshots for reuse by videoConcat.
silentComplete: concat no longer touches StatusBar.progress (no toast, no gen-timer reset).
completion toast fires immediately, not inside the supersession-token-gated 400ms defer (fixes swallowed first toast on queue).
Create New = Extend minus concat; shared _captureLastFrameMedia (always last-frame seed, strip stale startFrame); refreshControls after reuse settings.
new el.refreshControls() re-mounts active controls to re-read persisted settings.
status-bar info strings: 'Extend video from last frame' / 'Create video from last frame'.
